languages.original_text: "I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

languages.text: "Интересно, что в этом месте вызвало у тебя столь необычную реакцию? Кажется, мы имеем дело с неким феноменом, упорядочивающим течения Имматериума. Проверкой гипотез придется заняться в текущих полевых условиях".

"I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."
languages.original_text: "Интересно, что в этом месте вызвало у тебя столь необычную реакцию? Кажется, мы имеем дело с неким феноменом, упорядочивающим течения Имматериума. Проверкой гипотез придется заняться в текущих полевых условиях".

traits.locale_text: "I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

"I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

"I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

languages.text: 「この場所の何かに触れたことで、あなたはこんな珍しい反応を示したのでしょうか？我々は、物質の海を流れる電流を規制するような現象と関わっているようです。現在の状況下で仮説を検証する必要があるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

traits.locale_text: 「この場所の何かに触れたことで、あなたはこんな珍しい反応を示したのでしょうか？我々は、物質の海を流れる電流を規制するような現象と関わっているようです。現在の状況下で仮説を検証する必要があるでしょう。」

languages.text: « Je me demande ce qui a bien pu susciter une réaction aussi inhabituelle chez vous. Il semblerait que nous ayons affaire à un phénomène qui régule les courants de l'Immaterium. Nous allons devoir éprouver nos hypothèses dans les conditions actuelles. »
languages.original_text: "I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

traits.locale_text: « Je me demande ce qui a bien pu susciter une réaction aussi inhabituelle chez vous. Il semblerait que nous ayons affaire à un phénomène qui régule les courants de l'Immaterium. Nous allons devoir éprouver nos hypothèses dans les conditions actuelles. »

languages.text: "Ich frage mich, was eine derart ungewöhnliche Reaktion ausgelöst haben könnte. Wir haben es hier offenbar mit einem Phänomen zu tun, das die Strömungen des Immateriums reguliert. Dieser Hypothese werden wir unter den derzeitigen Feldbedingungen überprüfen müssen."
languages.original_text: "I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

traits.locale_text: "Ich frage mich, was eine derart ungewöhnliche Reaktion ausgelöst haben könnte. Wir haben es hier offenbar mit einem Phänomen zu tun, das die Strömungen des Immateriums reguliert. Dieser Hypothese werden wir unter den derzeitigen Feldbedingungen überprüfen müssen."

languages.text: "Bu mekânda neyin sizde böyle olağan dışı bir tepkiye neden olduğunu merak ediyorum. Görünüşe göre Tindiyar'ın akımlarını düzenleyen bir tür fenomenle karşı karşıyayız. Hipotezleri mevcut saha koşullarında test etmemiz gerekecek."
languages.original_text: "I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

traits.locale_text: "Bu mekânda neyin sizde böyle olağan dışı bir tepkiye neden olduğunu merak ediyorum. Görünüşe göre Tindiyar'ın akımlarını düzenleyen bir tür fenomenle karşı karşıyayız. Hipotezleri mevcut saha koşullarında test etmemiz gerekecek."

languages.text: «Me pregunto qué habrá en este sitio para provocarle una reacción tan poco habitual. Parece que nos enfrentamos a algún tipo de fenómeno que regula las corrientes del inmaterio. Tendremos que poner a prueba las hipótesis en las actuales condiciones del entorno».
languages.original_text: "I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

traits.locale_text: «Me pregunto qué habrá en este sitio para provocarle una reacción tan poco habitual. Parece que nos enfrentamos a algún tipo de fenómeno que regula las corrientes del inmaterio. Tendremos que poner a prueba las hipótesis en las actuales condiciones del entorno».

languages.text: “我很好奇，这个地方究竟有什么，能激起你如此异常的反应？看来我们正面临某种调节亚空间流的现象。我们必须在当前实地条件下验证相关假说。”
languages.original_text: "I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."

traits.locale_text: “我很好奇，这个地方究竟有什么，能激起你如此异常的反应？看来我们正面临某种调节亚空间流的现象。我们必须在当前实地条件下验证相关假说。”
